name: autonexus
description: AutoNexus — autonomous goal-directed iteration engine with Obsidian as knowledge backbone. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch.

metadata.description: AutoNexus plugin marketplace — autonomous iteration with Obsidian knowledge backbone

plugins.name: autonexus
plugins.description: Autonomous iteration engine with Obsidian MCP integration. 10 commands: /autonexus (core loop), /autonexus:plan (goal wizard), /autonexus:predict (multi-persona swarm), /autonexus:debug (bug hunter), /autonexus:fix (error crusher), /autonexus:security (STRIDE+OWASP audit), /autonexus:ship (universal shipping), /autonexus:scenario (edge case explorer), /autonexus:learn (documentation engine), /autonexus:setup (Obsidian MCP configurator). Every iteration reads from and writes to Obsidian.
